title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ANILAO, PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3971 / 57 OG No. 11, 1949 (March 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2871, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ANILAO, PROVINCE OF ILOILO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

The sitios of Aglay-ao, Malublub and Agbalatong, into a distinct and independent barrio, to be known as the barrio of Balabag; and

The sitios of Agcarope, Opao, Alabedhan, Agloy-a, Ilaya, Alibayug and Agbatasan, into a distinct and pendent barrio, to be known as the barrio of Guipes.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
